prd.problem: A buyer put off by the asking price often just leaves without a word. Haggling is common in local deals, but the app has no place to negotiate, so buyers must awkwardly open with 'can you lower it?' in chat
prd.solution: Offer a price right from the listing detail, and the seller responds with accept, decline, or counter. Structuring the haggle lowers the barrier to starting a deal
inScope: Send a price offer from the listing detail
prd.goal: Raise the chat-conversion rate of listings that receive an offer by 15% versus before

scenarios.text: Jiyoung offers $80 on a $100 sofa; the seller counters at $90, and she accepts to start the deal

requirements.title: Price offer
requirements.desc: A haggle flow where the buyer offers and the seller responds

acceptance.text: No deal is confirmed before the seller responds

features.title: Send an offer
features.desc: The buyer proposes a desired price

specs.title: Amount input
specs.desc: Enter a desired amount at or below the asking price

specs.title: Attach a message
specs.desc: Add a short message to the offer

features.title: Seller response
features.desc: Reply with accept, decline, or counter

specs.title: Accept, decline, or counter
specs.desc: Respond to an offer in three ways
